implementation.body1: We don't believe in generic setups. Your Elite plan secures a 20-Hour Dedicated Engineering Sprint where our team builds your specific business logic from the ground up.
implementation.body2: Whether you are automating a single department or an entire operation, we handle the heavy lifting. Our engineers focus on creating a seamless, turnkey solution so you can stop worrying about the tech and start focusing on your growth.
pills: Full Turnkey Setup ($2,000 Setup Fee - WAIVED)
implementation.note: *Projects are scheduled in the order assets are received. We only accept 5 Elite implementations per month to ensure focused engineering quality.

enterprise.body: Bespoke AI architecture and dedicated infrastructure for global organizations. Built to scale without limits.

testimonials.title: Don't just take our word for it
testimonials.subtitle: Join the growing number of businesses that have transformed their sales process with Apturio.

items.name: Yus Muro
items.text: My experience with Apturio has been very personal and positive... wholeheartedly recommend them for seeking genuine and reliable support in medical marketing.

items.name: Bella Bellarda
items.text: Apturio helped consolidate my entire database of over 5,000 contacts, and we'll be working with them on email marketing and much more. They're not only streamlining my processes but also giving me greater ease and insight into my business as an influencer. Thank you so much.

items.name: En Otro Idioma
items.text: I want to thank Apturio for allowing us to host our website with them. The website will be going live very soon, and we're super excited about how it's looking so far. Thank you for all your support and attention—we truly appreciate it.

items.name: Venxel Team
items.text: Apturio is a key strategic partner for Venxel. They've played a crucial role in strengthening our entire ecosystem — from CRM and automation to intelligent chatbot solutions that help our clients capture, qualify, and convert leads more efficiently. Beyond that, they also provide robust infrastructure across email marketing, hosting, databases, and many other essential systems that support both our internal operations and our clients' growth. Their technology allows us to go far beyond traditional marketing and deliver real, measurable systems. It's not just about generating leads — it's about managing, nurturing, and maximizing every opportunity, and Apturio makes that possible. Honestly, they are one of the best strategic partners Venxel could have. We truly see this as a long-term relationship that will continue to grow and create value on both sides. We're extremely grateful for their support and excited for everything we'll continue building together.

items.a: Not at all. We handle the entire engineering setup, AI training, and CRM configuration for you. You just log in and sell.
No. We believe in results, not golden handcuffs. You can cancel your monthly subscription at any time.

items.q: How fast can I be up and running?
items.a: Our 'Ready-to-Sell' Sprint is designed to have you live in 30 days. This timeline is a high-intensity collaboration where our engineers execute your turnkey setup within an allocated 20-hour window, provided all client assets and accesses are delivered on time.

items.q: Does the AI sound like a robot?
items.a: No. We use advanced NLP (Natural Language Processing) to ensure your AI assistant sounds human, professional, and stays on-brand.

items.q: Can I integrate my existing tools?
items.a: Yes. Apturio is built to be the unified brain of your operation. We connect with your existing marketing stack via open APIs.

items.q: What happens after the setup is done? Will I be on my own?
items.a: Absolutely not. You get priority support and continuous AI updates to ensure your engine never stops evolving. If you need additional custom implementations or ongoing strategy support, we offer flexible hourly packages tailored to your growth. You'll never be alone.

Yes, certain advanced features like AI usage, premium workflow actions, and telecom services (SMS, calls, emails) are billed on a pay-per-use basis directly through the platform. These rates are subject to change. Please review the [/pay-per-use]

Yes! While our core plans give you everything you need to run your sales machine, we offer optional add-ons like dedicated Phone Systems, advanced Prospecting Tools, automated Ad Managers, and WordPress hosting. These are priced separately and subject to change. Please review the [/add-ons]

footer.advantageBody: While every other CRM sells you a subscription and wishes you luck, Apturio builds it for you. We include 20 hours of senior engineering setup for FREE so you can focus on scaling, not on configuring software.
footer.advantageGoal: Our goal is to have you live in 30 days. This sprint is a high-intensity collaboration; once your assets are provided, our engineers execute your turnkey setup within the allocated 20-hour window.
footer.advantageSafety: Setup subject to client cooperation and asset delivery within the 20-hour engineering limit.

content.title: 1. Information We Collect
content.text: We collect information you provide directly to us, such as when you create an account, subscribe to our newsletter, or contact us for support. This may include your name, email address, phone number, and any other information you choose to provide.

content.title: 2. How We Use Your Information
content.text: We use the information we collect to provide, maintain, and improve our services, to communicate with you, and to develop new products and services.

content.title: 3. Information Sharing
content.text: We do not share your personal information with third parties except as described in this policy, such as with your consent or to comply with legal obligations.

content.title: 4. Data Security
content.text: We take reasonable measures to help protect information about you from loss, theft, misuse and unauthorized access, disclosure, alteration and destruction.

content.title: 1. Acceptance of Terms
content.text: By accessing or using our services, you agree to be bound by these Terms of Service. If you do not agree to these terms, please do not use our services.

content.title: 2. Description of Service
content.text: Apturio provides AI-powered sales automation and CRM implementation services. We reserve the right to modify or discontinue the service at any time.

content.title: 3. User Responsibilities
content.text: You are responsible for maintaining the confidentiality of your account information and for all activities that occur under your account.

content.title: 4. Limitation of Liability
content.text: Apturio shall not be liable for any indirect, incidental, special, consequential or punitive damages resulting from your use of the service.
